proposition: The Registr smluv (official contracts register) returns zero published contracts for IČO 24278815 (Able.cz) and zero for IČO 06526411 (Blackfish & Co.) — searched 18 July 2026, result pages preserved. Neither company appears as a party to any contract published under the Czech contracts-register act.
shortTitle: The Registr smluv (official contracts register) returns zero…
statusExplanation: Zdroj byl úspěšně dotázán, ale žádný odpovídající záznam nevrátil.
note: A genuine negative result from a successful query (the register only covers contracts with publication duty — mostly public-sector counterparties). This bounds, but does not disprove, the self-reported '4 tenders won' claim: no corresponding published contract was found.

sources.title: Registr smluv (smlouvy.gov.cz) — party search by IČO 24278815 and 06526411 (result pages preserved)
